summary: Iteration 110: Beverage Operations Intelligence Module - Backend 31/31 tests PASSED (100%). All endpoints working: bottle scanning with volume calculations, monthly inventory audits, consumption bar before/after event tracking, toast/arrival beverages with GL routing (non-alcoholic → GL 4100, alcoholic → GL 4200), pricing accuracy metrics, and FOH training module with real Emergent LLM.
critical_code_review_comments: GL routing correctly implemented: non-alcoholic → GL 4100 (Food Cost), alcoholic → GL 4200 (Beverage Cost)
Volume calculations accurate: 750ml=25.4oz, 1L=33.8oz, 1.75L=59.2oz with 10 volume levels (full to empty)
FOH Training uses real Emergent LLM Key (gpt-4.1) - NOT mocked
Consumption event-usage correctly calculates drinks_per_guest and pricing_accuracy
Audit completion calculates variance from POS with summary by location
All MongoDB collections properly exclude _id from responses
seed_data_creation: Created test bottle scans, audits, consumption snaps for BEO 7626, toast/arrival logs for BEOs 7186/7200/7201, and FOH training sessions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 110 tested Beverage Operations Intelligence module. All 15 endpoints working: POST /api/beverage-ops/bottle-scan, GET /api/beverage-ops/bottle-scans, POST /api/beverage-ops/audit/start, POST /api/beverage-ops/audit/{id}/complete, GET /api/beverage-ops/audits, POST /api/beverage-ops/consumption/event-snap (before/after), GET /api/beverage-ops/consumption/event-usage, POST /api/beverage-ops/toast-arrival/log, GET /api/beverage-ops/toast-arrival/history, GET /api/beverage-ops/pricing-accuracy, POST /api/beverage-ops/foh-training/session, POST /api/beverage-ops/foh-training/{id}/message, GET /api/beverage-ops/foh-training/sessions. Critical: Non-alcoholic beverages correctly route to GL 4100 (Food Cost), alcoholic to GL 4200 (Beverage Cost).

POST /api/beverage-ops/audit/{id}/complete - completes with totals and variance - PASSED
GET /api/beverage-ops/consumption/event-usage?beo_number=7626 - calculates usage with drinks_per_guest and pricing_accuracy - PASSED
POST /api/beverage-ops/toast-arrival/log (mixed) - GL 4100 for non-alcoholic, GL 4200 for alcoholic - PASSED
POST /api/beverage-ops/toast-arrival/log (all non-alcoholic) - all to GL 4100 - PASSED
POST /api/beverage-ops/toast-arrival/log (all alcoholic) - all to GL 4200 - PASSED
GET /api/beverage-ops/pricing-accuracy - returns report with benchmarks - PASSED
POST /api/beverage-ops/foh-training/{id}/message - sends message, gets LLM response - PASSED
Volume levels verification (all 11 levels for 750ml) - PASSED

foh_training.llm_integration: Real Emergent LLM Key (gpt-4.1) - NOT mocked
